RuleSet.Name: src/schemapub/ISchemaPubTable.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 public interface for a $TableName$ record implementation

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaPubTableJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub

RuleSet.GenRule: $switch RelationType Superclass empty Components empty Children empty default attemptDeclPubISchemaTableRelationSetter$

public void set$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$(I$reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Pub$reference ToTable TableName$ argObj); public void set$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$($iterate Columns(first declPubSetArgColumn each declPubCommaSetArgColumn)$);
public $implPubJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implPubJavaAtomType$ $lower implPubColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $implPubJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $implJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
$switch HasSuperClassRelation no maybeDeclPubRecOptAuditColumnAttrAccessors default empty$$iterate Columns( each maybeDeclPubSchemaRecTableRecDataColumn )$
$reference BaseClass reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( lone IsNullable first IsNullable each empty empty no )$
public $declJavaAtomType$ get$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $declJavaAtomType$ $lower declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $declJavaAtomType$ get$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $declJavaAtomType$ $lower declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $declJavaAtomType$ get$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $declJavaAtomType$ $lower declColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
$switch HasAuditColumns yes declPubAuditColumnInitValues default empty$$iterate Columns( each maybeDeclPubInitValue empty empty )$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef empty BoolDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified EnumDef declPubInitValue Id16Gen declPubInitValue Id32Gen declPubInitValue Id64Gen declPubInitValue Int16Def declPubInitValue Int32Def declPubInitValue Int64Def declPubInitValue UInt16Def declPubInitValue UInt32Def declPubInitValue UInt64Def declPubInitValue FloatDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified DoubleDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified NumberDef declPubInitValue DateDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified TimeDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified TimestampDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified TZDateDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified TZTimeDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified TZTimestampDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash128Gen declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash160Gen declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash224Gen declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash256Gen declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash384Gen declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash512Gen declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash128Def declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash160Def declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash224Def declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash256Def declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash384Def declPubInitValueIfSpecified DbKeyHash512Def declPubInitValueIfSpecified Uuid6Gen declPubInitValueIfSpecified Uuid6Def declPubInitValueIfSpecified UuidGen declPubInitValueIfSpecified UuidDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified StringDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified TokenDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified NmTokenDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified NmTokensDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified TextDef declPubInitValueIfSpecified default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef empty BoolDef empty EnumDef declPubMinValue Id16Gen declPubMinValueIfSpecified Id32Gen declPubMinValueIfSpecified Id64Gen declPubMinValueIfSpecified Int16Def declPubMinValueIfSpecified Int32Def declPubMinValueIfSpecified Int64Def declPubMinValueIfSpecified UInt16Def declPubMinValueIfSpecified UInt32Def declPubMinValueIfSpecified UInt64Def declPubMinValueIfSpecified FloatDef declPubMinValueIfSpecified DoubleDef declPubMinValueIfSpecified NumberDef declPubMinValueIfSpecified DateDef empty TimeDef empty TimestampDef empty TZDateDef empty TZTimeDef empty TZTimestampDef empty DbKeyHash128Gen empty DbKeyHash160Gen empty DbKeyHash224Gen empty DbKeyHash256Gen empty DbKeyHash384Gen empty DbKeyHash512Gen empty DbKeyHash128Def empty DbKeyHash160Def empty DbKeyHash224Def empty DbKeyHash256Def empty DbKeyHash384Def empty DbKeyHash512Def empty Uuid6Gen empty Uuid6Def empty UuidGen empty UuidDef empty StringDef empty TokenDef empty NmTokenDef empty NmTokensDef empty TextDef empty default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef empty BoolDef empty EnumDef declPubMaxValue Id16Gen declPubMaxValueIfSpecified Id32Gen declPubMaxValueIfSpecified Id64Gen declPubMaxValueIfSpecified Int16Def declPubMaxValueIfSpecified Int32Def declPubMaxValueIfSpecified Int64Def declPubMaxValueIfSpecified UInt16Def declPubMaxValueIfSpecified UInt32Def declPubMaxValueIfSpecified UInt64Def declPubMaxValueIfSpecified FloatDef declPubMaxValueIfSpecified DoubleDef declPubMaxValueIfSpecified NumberDef declPubMaxValueIfSpecified DateDef empty TimeDef empty TimestampDef empty TZDateDef empty TZTimeDef empty TZTimestampDef empty DbKeyHash128Gen empty DbKeyHash160Gen empty DbKeyHash224Gen empty DbKeyHash256Gen empty DbKeyHash384Gen empty DbKeyHash512Gen empty DbKeyHash128Def empty DbKeyHash160Def empty DbKeyHash224Def empty DbKeyHash256Def empty DbKeyHash384Def empty DbKeyHash512Def empty Uuid6Gen empty Uuid6Def empty UuidGen empty UuidDef empty StringDef empty TokenDef empty NmTokenDef empty NmTokensDef empty TextDef empty default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$
public final static int CLASS_CODE = 0x$ClassCode$; public final static String S_CLASS_CODE = "$ClassCode$";
extends I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Pub$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$
//@Override not necessary because interfaces aren't able to implement Comparable, but they can double-team on the requirement public int compareTo( Object obj );
public void set( I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Pub$reference BaseClass TableName$ src ); public void setPub$TableName$( I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$ src );$declPubRecSetHistory$
public void set( I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Pub$reference BaseClass TableName$H src ); public void setPub$TableName$( I$DefSchemaName$Pub$TableName$H src );
